2360680.name: Dust & Neon Soundtrack
2360680.description:
The robots have taken over and you’re just the gunslinger to stop them. Not even death will slow you down in this action-packed twin-stick roguelite shooter. Ending the robot uprising will require the perfect tunes though. So grab your guns and headphones and get ready to immerse yourself in the post-apocalyptic Wild West with the Dust & Neon Soundtrack.

These western electronic beats will keep your heart thumping as you roll and dodge, line up your shots, and take down your targets. Explore the soundscapes of the unique biomes and bosses in the game with 17 exciting tracks.
